experiences.title: Professional Sabbatical
highlights: Focused on professional growth through freelance web development and continuous learning.
Built websites while strengthening expertise in Astro, Laravel, GSAP, AWS, software architecture, and system design.
Accelerated development with Claude and Gemini while ensuring code quality through engineering review.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Engineer
highlights: Built and maintained scalable SaaS applications using React, Node.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and GCP.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design, deploy, and maintain reliable production systems.
Led the Salesloft Mobile application using React Native, Zustand, and TypeScript.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Engineer
highlights: Developed features for an e-learning platform using React, Redux, GraphQL, Node.js, Express, AWS Lambda, AWS S3, Amazon DynamoDB, and PostgreSQL.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer
highlights: Contributed to a legal news website redesign using React, Redux, and Foundation CSS.
Built QA automation tools with Node.js, Express, Puppeteer, and Angular 2.
